node_data.name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Smoky Bake
node_data.short_description: A one-pan sheet-pan dinner featuring smoky-tossed pork tenderloin, potatoes, and green beans roasted with olive oil for a balanced, convenient meal.
node_data.meal_suggestion: Serving idea: 4 oz pork tenderloin, 1 cup potatoes, and 1 cup green beans, roasted with olive oil and smoky spices. Lightly season for flavor and pair with a simple leafy-green salad for extra volume and nutrients.
node_data.nutrition_note: Lean protein from pork tenderloin; fiber from potatoes and green beans; healthy fats from olive oil. Provides a balanced mix of protein, complex carbohydrates, and micronutrients; can reduce calories by using a smaller amount of oil and trimming visible fat.
